name: Cranberry Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom and sides of an 8x8-inch pan with plastic wrap.
2. Bring cranberries and corn syrup to a boil in a medium saucepan.
3. Boil on high for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the liquid is reduced to 3 tablespoons.
4. Remove from heat.
5. Add chocolate chips, stirring until completely melted.
6. Add remaining ingredients, stirring vigorously until the mixture is thick and glossy.
7. Pour into prepared pan.
8. Cover and chill until firm.
9. Cut into 1 1/2-inch squares.
10. Store covered in refrigerator. Makes 25 pieces.
